name: holliday_segar_fluid_calculation_workflow
description: Calculate daily maintenance fluid requirement for a child using the Holliday-Segar formula based on body weight.

inputs.input_desc: Weight of the child in kilograms

steps.step_description: Apply the Holliday-Segar formula to calculate daily maintenance fluid in mL based on weight.

step_inputs.input_desc: Weight of the child in kilograms

step_outputs.output_desc: Daily maintenance fluid requirement in mL, capped at 2400 mL if applicable

steps.reason: This step applies a segmented weight-based formula to determine fluid needs, a common pattern in pediatric maintenance fluid calculation.
steps.detail: Calculate daily fluid requirement (mL) using the Holliday-Segar formula: If weight <= 10 kg, daily_fluid = weight * 100. If weight is > 10 and <= 20 kg, daily_fluid = 1000 + (weight - 10) * 50. If weight > 20 kg, daily_fluid = 1500 + (weight - 20) * 20, with a maximum cap of 2400 mL.

output.output_desc: Final calculated daily maintenance fluid requirement in mL
